name: Delphos Stadium Park
description: Delphos Stadium Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Delphos, OH. There are 3 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Franklin Park
description: Franklin Park is a place to play pickleball in Van Wert, OH. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Smiley Park
description: Come play pickleball at Smiley Park in Van Wert, OH! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: YMCA Of Van Wert County
description: YMCA Of Van Wert County is a place to play pickleball in Van Wert, OH. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.
